heading: Omitted
label: 50b to 50d–1 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 50b to 50d–1, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 50b, , , authorized Secretary of the Interior to accept donations for school, medical, and reindeer service.act Mar. 7, 1928, ch. 137, § 145 Stat. 239Section 50c, , , related to availability of appropriations for education, medical relief, and reindeer.act May 14, 1930, ch. 273, § 146 Stat. 321Section 50d, , , empowered Secretary of the Interior to authorize officers to incur obligations for benefit of natives prior to appropriation.act May 9, 1938, ch. 187, § 152 Stat. 311Section 50d–1, , , empowered Secretary to authorize officers to incur obligations for benefit of natives in excess of current appropriations.act June 1, 1944, ch. 220, § 158 Stat. 266
